note: Single source of truth for the projects section. Update this file alongside the weekly scoreboard; the site rebuilds on push. Statuses: shipped | in-build | planned. Signals must be true before they are listed.

projects.name: Job Market Insights Dashboard
projects.tagline: 9,000+ AU entry-level IT job ads, scraped and analysed
projects.description: Scraped and structured over nine thousand Australian entry-level IT job advertisements, then built dashboards cutting the market by role, city, and skill demand.

projects.name: Beats by Dre Consumer Insights
projects.tagline: Sentiment analysis across 1,200+ reviews, 8 products, 5 markets
projects.description: End-to-end sentiment pipeline (NLTK VADER, TextBlob) over Amazon review data for a global audio brand, with a dedicated AU/NZ market analysis and four data-backed recommendations delivered as a capstone report.

projects.name: Runway Radar
projects.tagline: Fashion trend detection from runway imagery and editorial text
projects.description: Dual-pipeline trend spotter: CLIP-style visual embeddings and palette extraction on runway images, transformer and VADER sentiment on editorial text, combined into rising-versus-declining trend scores for styles, colours, and brands.

projects.name: localRAG
projects.description: A local retrieval-augmented generation pipeline: document ingestion, embedding, retrieval, and grounded answering without cloud dependencies.

projects.name: daily-practice
projects.tagline: Public log of DS/ML screening reps
projects.description: A running, dated log of LeetCode-style data science screening problems and Kaggle competition work: SQL window functions, pandas manipulation, statistics, and the patterns that actually appear in DS/ML interviews.
